description: Rigorous validation with negative controls and tighter tolerances

precision_combined.note: Extra extractions on positive controls due to secondary endpoints

improvements_from_v4.3.negative_context_filters: Added 50+ patterns to filter protocol/methods/review text
improvements_from_v4.3.hard_difficulty_trials: Added 6 hard + 4 very_hard trials to balance corpus
improvements_from_v4.3.rales_rr_pattern: Added pattern for 'relative risk of X, Y; 95 percent confidence interval' format
improvements_from_v4.3.tighter_tolerances: Implemented absolute tolerance (0.01 value, 0.02 CI) in addition to relative
